testsuite.name: features.nodoInviaRPT.nodoInviaRPT_noStamp.User pays a single payment without stamps via nodoInviaRPT

testcase.classname: features.nodoInviaRPT.nodoInviaRPT_noStamp.User pays a single payment without stamps via nodoInviaRPT
testcase.name: User pays a single payment with single transfer and no stamp

testcase.classname: features.nodoInviaRPT.nodoInviaRPT_noStamp.User pays a single payment without stamps via nodoInviaRPT
testcase.name: User pays a single payment with two transfers and no stamp

testcase.classname: features.nodoInviaRPT.nodoInviaRPT_noStamp.User pays a single payment without stamps via nodoInviaRPT
testcase.name: User pays a single payment with three transfers and no stamp

testcase.classname: features.nodoInviaRPT.nodoInviaRPT_noStamp.User pays a single payment without stamps via nodoInviaRPT
testcase.name: User pays a single payment with four transfers and no stamp

testcase.classname: features.nodoInviaRPT.nodoInviaRPT_noStamp.User pays a single payment without stamps via nodoInviaRPT
testcase.name: User pays a single payment with five transfers and no stamp

testcase.classname: features.nodoInviaRPT.nodoInviaRPT_noStamp.User pays a single payment without stamps via nodoInviaRPT
testcase.name: User pays a single payment as PO type with one transfer and no stamp

testcase.classname: features.nodoInviaRPT.nodoInviaRPT_noStamp.User pays a single payment without stamps via nodoInviaRPT
testcase.name: User pays a single payment as PO type with two transfer and no stamp

testcase.classname: features.nodoInviaRPT.nodoInviaRPT_noStamp.User pays a single payment without stamps via nodoInviaRPT
testcase.name: User executes a first redirect, then execute the redirection again and complete the payment flow

failure.message: The status code is not 302. Current value: 200.

testcase.failure: Failing step: And the user is redirected on Checkout completing the payment ... failed in 0.372s Location: src/bdd/wisp/features/nodoInviaRPT/nodoInviaRPT_noStamp.feature:78 Assertion Failed: The status code is not 302. Current value: 200. Captured logging: INFO:root:Response status code: 200 INFO:root:Response body: <Element 'Envelope' at 0x000001F8F25B1A30>

testcase.classname: features.nodoInviaRPT.nodoInviaRPT_noStamp.User pays a single payment without stamps via nodoInviaRPT
testcase.name: User tries two time to pay the same RPT but the conversion to the new model fails

testcase.classname: features.nodoInviaRPT.nodoInviaRPT_noStamp.User pays a single payment without stamps via nodoInviaRPT
testcase.name: User tries the payment, then retries again the flow but fails
